GetInTouch.YourDream: Tell us about your dream Paris experience...

DetailsPage.EmbarkOn: Embark on an unforgettable journey through the heart of France, where timeless elegance meets provincial charm. From the iconic boulevards of Paris to the lavender-scented fields of Provence, this carefully curated experience offers an authentic taste of French culture, cuisine, and hospitality. Discover hidden gems, savor world-class wines, and immerse yourself in the rich history that has shaped this magnificent country. Our expert local guides will ensure every moment is filled with wonder and delight.

About.Name: Garik Sahakyan
About.Over12Years: and I am a professional Russian-speaking guide in Paris and the regions of France with over 12 years of experience.
About.OverTheYears: Over the years, I've led over 500 tours for tourists from all over the world. My specialty isn't just showing off the sights, but
About.InLoveWithParis: I'm in love with Paris and know it like the back of my hand. I'd love to share secret spots, interesting facts, and show you the city from unusual angles.
About.CertifiedGuide: Certified guide with over than 12 years of experience
About.GuideInterpreter: Certified guide-interpreter for Paris and Ile-de-France
About.Diploma: Diploma in Art History from Sorbonne University
About.AccreditationAtLouvre: Accreditation at the Louvre, Versailles and the national museums of France
About.Values: The values ​​that determine the quality of my excursions
About.LivedAndBreathed: I've lived and breathed this city for over 15 years. My passion for Paris is passed on to every visitor, and I want you to love it as much as I do.
About.TailoredTours: Each tour is tailored to your interests. Small groups of up to 15 people allow for individual attention.
About.AnOfficialLicense: An official license, deep knowledge of history and art, and ongoing training are the key to high-quality excursions.
About.FamousPlace: I show not only famous places, but also hidden gems of Paris, known only to locals.
About.ThePath: The path from tourist to professional guide
About.FellInLove: I fell in love with the city and decided to connect my life with it.
